title: Brokerage Clerks
description: Perform duties related to the purchase, sale, or holding of securities. Duties include writing orders for stock purchases or sales, computing transfer taxes, verifying stock transactions, accepting and delivering securities, tracking stock price fluctuations, computing equity, distributing dividends, and keeping records of daily transactions and holdings.

tasks.text: Correspond with customers and confer with coworkers to answer inquiries, discuss market fluctuations, or resolve account problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document security transactions, such as purchases, sales, conversions, redemptions, or payments, using computers, accounting ledgers, or certificate records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: File, type, or operate standard office machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform clerical tasks, such as answering phones or distributing mail.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare forms, such as receipts, withdrawal orders, transmittal papers, or transfer confirmations, based on transaction requests from stockholders.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Schedule and coordinate transfer and delivery of security certificates between companies, departments, and customers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor daily stock prices and compute fluctuations to determine the need for additional collateral to secure loans.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Verify ownership and transaction information and dividend distribution instructions to ensure conformance with governmental regulations, using stock records and reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compute total holdings, dividends, interest, transfer taxes, brokerage fees, or commissions and allocate appropriate payments to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports summarizing daily transactions and earnings for individual customer accounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
